headline: The Billion-Dollar Asterisk On Nike
summary: The footwear giant is posting eye-popping bottom-line numbers, but investors are worried a massive one-time accounting windfall is masking a structural slump, not a true turnaround.

raw.headline: The Billion-Dollar Asterisk On Nike
raw.summary: The footwear giant is posting eye-popping bottom-line numbers, but investors are worried a massive one-time accounting windfall is masking a structural slump, not a true turnaround.

headline: Quanta Services and Peabody Energy have been highlighted as Zacks Bull and Bear of the Day
summary: Quanta Services is highlighted as Zacks' Bull of the Day on AI-driven grid demand, while Peabody Energy faces pressure from weak earnings and coal headwinds.

raw.headline: Quanta Services and Peabody Energy have been highlighted as Zacks Bull and Bear of the Day
raw.summary: Quanta Services is highlighted as Zacks' Bull of the Day on AI-driven grid demand, while Peabody Energy faces pressure from weak earnings and coal headwinds.

headline: Lululemon adds Chip Wilson board picks Marc Maurer, Laura Gentile
summary: After trading barbs with its founder, the company is fulfilling its end of the agreement to add the On co-founder and ESPN veteran to its board.

raw.headline: Lululemon adds Chip Wilson board picks Marc Maurer, Laura Gentile
raw.summary: After trading barbs with its founder, the company is fulfilling its end of the agreement to add the On co-founder and ESPN veteran to its board.
